steps.title: Identify the key preference difference
steps.content: The researchers found that great blue herons prefer areas with deep water during breeding season, but small dark herons do not.

steps.title: Apply the finding to the conclusion
steps.content:
Choice A says the strategies are less likely to attract small dark herons than great blue herons—the logical outcome of one species preferring deep water and the other not.

The other options either overlook the species-level comparison, introduce unsupported factors like lifespan or non-wetland birds, or contradict the findings.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
